experiences.company: Times Innovative Media Limited - (The Times Group)
experiences.title: Chief Strategy Officer (CSO), Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO) and Head Marketing
experiences.description: In my current role as, Chief Strategy Officer, Head of HR and Marketing and Business Head Mauritius, I am leading the company’s international operations, setting-up new lines of business, driving growth and efficiencies of core brands for the Times Group. As Head of HR, focused on developing competencies and talent for future. In addition, has set-up new lines of businesses, established new markets, created new products and helped increase the market share for some of the flagship brands of Group.

experiences.title: Member Board of Directors
experiences.description: Advise and guide the set-up of skills committee for media sector in India

experiences.title: Executive Vice President Strategy
experiences.description: Head corporate strategy, policy development, innovations and new initiatives for ENIL and its Group companies - radio, OOH, events, movies and activations.

experiences.title: Dy Chief Manager - Corporate
experiences.description:
Currently working in the corporate planning and strategy department of Bennett Coleman & Company Ltd - Times Group, a leading Media and Entertainment company of India. 

Working with Vice Chairman & Managing Director, responsible for strategizing, planning and implementing new initiatives across various divisions of Times Group. In this capacity, I am responsible for increasing pan India presence of the English Newspapers (Times of India and Economic Times)and developing future revenue growth plans for Radio Mirchi (FM Radio Channel). Also developed long term vision and strategy for the internet businesses  timesjob.com & timesmatri.com.

experiences.title: Consultant
experiences.description:
Worked for five years in the business consultancy group of IBM Global Services which is the worlds largest consulting services organization.

As a business consultant, responsibilities included project management and executing consulting assignments in the area of Business Transformations, Process Redesign, IT Strategy, IT Solution Selection and Change Management.  In addition have administered the full project life cycle including sales and marketing activities, administration and development of proposals and actual execution of a project.

education.description: The course covers a range of topics, including corporate finance, economic and accounting concepts, cost management, and quantitative analysis. It also covers financial risk management, investment and portfolio management, and mergers and acquisitions.

education.school: Manipal Institute of Technology, Manipal, Karnataka, India

recommendations:
Rajesh Agarwal

I have known Aman since 1996 when we both worked in the Management Consulting Practice within TCS.  I had the opportunity to work with Aman on a Strategy Engagement for a client and though Aman was just out of college then I was very impressed by his maturity, focus and structured approach to problem solving.  Aman is passionate for excellence and has the skills and tenacity to drive large scale business transformation.

LinkedIn User

I reported to Aman for almost half a decade in different structures during my stint at Times and I must say that I was extremely lucky to have a line manager like him. Aman is a born leader to who we all looked upto and the go to person for taking professional advice on any challenges we faced. His management style is a perfect blend of strategic thinking which directed me to think macro and a people oriented approach which helped me share my thoughts openly if ever I faced any challenges in execution of tasks. If there were an article on qualities of a leader, aman is equipped with all sets that form a part of it. Thanks aman for the enriching experience I got under your mentorship and wish you all the best for all your future endeavours.
